subjects.description: snow dusted mountain range above an autumn valley
subjects.appearance_details: jagged peaks with light snow caps, shadowed slopes, warm sunset edges, layered ridgelines fading into haze
subjects.relationship: dominant landscape subject framing the valley and river below
subjects.location: background horizon across the full width of the frame
subjects.relative_size: very large, occupying the upper third of the panorama
subjects.orientation: peaks rising vertically with ridges extending left and right
subjects.action: holds steady while sunset light slowly warms the snow and shadows lengthen
subjects.state_changes: golden highlights deepen and the valley shadows stretch across the scene
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: gray rock, white snow dusting, blue shadowed creases

subjects.appearance_details: silver blue water reflecting orange sky, smooth bends, dark green forest banks mixed with autumn gold and red
subjects.relationship: guides the eye from foreground valley toward the mountains
subjects.location: middle ground curving through the valley
subjects.relative_size: medium ribbon across the broad landscape
subjects.orientation: meanders diagonally from lower right toward center distance
subjects.action: moves gently with small glints of reflected sunset
subjects.state_changes: surface highlights brighten and slide downstream as the camera drifts
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: clear reflective water with soft ripples

subjects.appearance_details: small flowers in yellow, white, purple, and red among green grasses, lightly moving in the breeze
subjects.relationship: adds color and scale to the panoramic nature view
subjects.location: foreground lower edge of the frame
subjects.relative_size: small individual flowers forming a broad colorful carpet
subjects.orientation: upright stems facing the low sun
subjects.action: sway gently in the evening breeze
subjects.state_changes: petals catch shifting sunlight as the camera glides forward
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: soft petals, thin stems, textured grasses

background_setting: panoramic mountain valley with snow capped peaks, winding river, dense green and autumn forests, foreground wildflowers, and orange pink sunset sky

lighting.conditions: low warm sunset light with long shadows across the valley, soft haze on distant peaks, glowing sky reflections in the river
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: low warm sunset light with long shadows across the valley, soft haze on distant peaks, glowing sky reflections in the river

aesthetics.composition: awe inspiring, peaceful, grand, richly colored, natural realism
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: awe inspiring, peaceful, grand, richly colored, natural realism

cinematography.camera_motion: slow aerial push forward over wildflowers into a wide valley panorama, deep focus from foreground blooms to distant peaks
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: photorealistic text to video landscape panorama
artistic_style: cinematic nature documentary style with warm sunset color grading
context: an untouched mountain valley is shown at the quiet moment before dusk, emphasizing scale, color, and calm

the view opens wider to the snow dusted mountains while the river glints through autumn trees
the camera settles into a full panorama as sunset colors intensify and shadows stretch across the valley

temporal_caption: A golden sunset reveals snow dusted mountains, a winding river, autumn forest, and wildflowers in a serene panorama.
